disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: WHO to declare end of hantavirus outbreak on July 2 - Plataforma Media
updates.body_en: WHO to declare end of hantavirus outbreak on July 2 Plataforma Media
updates.summary_zh: WHO 宣布将于7月2日结束汉坦病毒疫情。

updates.title_en: WHO says cruise linked hantavirus outbreak will end by July 2 - mezha.net
updates.body_en: WHO says cruise linked hantavirus outbreak will end by July 2 mezha.net
updates.summary_zh: WHO 称邮轮关联的汉坦病毒疫情将于7月2日结束。

updates.title_en: US CDC to wind down hantavirus response - Medical Buyer
updates.body_en: US CDC to wind down hantavirus response Medical Buyer
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 将缩减汉坦病毒应对措施。

updates.title_en: WHO announces timeline for end of hantavirus outbreak - Українські Національні Новини (УНН)
updates.body_en: WHO announces timeline for end of hantavirus outbreak Українські Національні Новини (УНН)
updates.summary_zh: WHO 公布汉坦病毒疫情结束时间表。

updates.title_en: Global Hantavirus Response To End On July 2: WHO - Health and Me
updates.body_en: Global Hantavirus Response To End On July 2: WHO Health and Me
updates.summary_zh: WHO 称全球汉坦病毒应对将于7月2日结束。

updates.title_en: No additional cases found after hantavirus cruise ship outbreak - Central Oregon Daily
updates.body_en: No additional cases found after hantavirus cruise ship outbreak Central Oregon Daily
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒邮轮疫情后未发现新增病例。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus Outbreak Should Formally End On July 2: WHO - NDTV
updates.body_en: Hantavirus Outbreak Should Formally End On July 2: WHO NDTV
updates.summary_zh: WHO 称汉坦病毒疫情应于7月2日正式结束。

updates.title_en: CDC concludes hantavirus response as outbreak eases - KSL.com
updates.body_en: CDC concludes hantavirus response as outbreak eases KSL.com
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 结束汉坦病毒疫情响应，疫情缓解。

updates.title_en: HHS Marks End of Hantavirus Response - news8000.com
updates.body_en: HHS Marks End of Hantavirus Response news8000.com
updates.summary_zh: 美国 HHS 宣布结束汉坦病毒疫情响应。

updates.title_en: The CDC said hantavirus outbreak is over - Deseret News
updates.body_en: The CDC said hantavirus outbreak is over Deseret News
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 称汉坦病毒疫情已结束。

updates.title_en: CDC concludes response to hantavirus outbreak on cruise - upi.com
updates.body_en: CDC concludes response to hantavirus outbreak on cruise upi.com
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 结束邮轮汉坦病毒疫情响应。

updates.title_en: US ends hantavirus outbreak response with no answers on draconian quarantines - Ars Technica
updates.body_en: US ends hantavirus outbreak response with no answers on draconian quarantines Ars Technica
updates.summary_zh: 美国结束汉坦病毒疫情响应，但未解释严格隔离措施。

updates.title_en: Deadly Hantavirus outbreak should end on 2 July, WHO says - Euronews.com
updates.body_en: Deadly Hantavirus outbreak should end on 2 July, WHO says Euronews.com
updates.summary_zh: WHO 称汉坦病毒疫情应于 7 月 2 日结束。

updates.title_en: US public health agency concludes hantavirus response as outbreak eases - Al Jazeera
updates.body_en: US public health agency concludes hantavirus response as outbreak eases Al Jazeera
updates.summary_zh: 美国公共卫生机构结束汉坦病毒疫情响应，疫情缓解。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus Outbreak Should Formally End On July 2: WHO - NDTV
updates.body_en: Hantavirus Outbreak Should Formally End On July 2: WHO NDTV
updates.summary_zh: WHO 宣布汉坦病毒疫情将于7月2日正式结束。

updates.title_en: US ends its hantavirus response as quarantines expire and threat wanes - The Independent
updates.body_en: US ends its hantavirus response as quarantines expire and threat wanes The Independent
updates.summary_zh: 美国结束汉坦病毒应急响应，隔离到期，威胁减弱。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus self-isolation complete for 34 Canadians, Health Canada says - National - Global News
updates.body_en: Hantavirus self-isolation complete for 34 Canadians, Health Canada says - National Global News
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大34人完成汉坦病毒自我隔离，加拿大公共卫生署确认。

updates.title_en: Exclusive | CDC Ends Hantavirus Response as U.S. Outbreak Risk Diminishes - WSJ
updates.body_en: Exclusive | CDC Ends Hantavirus Response as U.S. Outbreak Risk Diminishes WSJ CDC ends US Hantavirus response The Hill US public health agency concludes hantavirus response as outbreak eases Al Jazeera
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 结束汉坦病毒应急响应，疫情风险降低。

updates.title_en: WHO says hantavirus outbreak to be declared over by July 2 if no new cases emerge - Anadolu Ajansı
updates.body_en: WHO says hantavirus outbreak to be declared over by July 2 if no new cases emerge Anadolu Ajansı
updates.summary_zh: WHO 称若未出现新病例，汉坦病毒疫情将于7月2日宣布结束。

updates.title_en: CDC Officially Ends Hantavirus Response as Outbreak Risk Recedes - AJMC
updates.body_en: CDC Officially Ends Hantavirus Response as Outbreak Risk Recedes AJMC
updates.summary_zh: 美国 CDC 正式结束汉坦病毒应急响应，疫情风险消退。

updates.title_en: Quick takes: More New World screwworm; CDC to cease measles, mumps testing; hantavirus response ends - CIDRAP
updates.body_en: Quick takes: More New World screwworm; CDC to cease measles, mumps testing; hantavirus response ends CIDRAP
updates.summary_zh: CIDRAP 简报：美国 CDC 结束汉坦病毒响应，同时停止麻疹、腮腺炎检测。

updates.title_en: HHS Successfully Concludes Hantavirus Response Effort; Monitoring Ends with No Positive U.S. Case - HHS.gov
updates.body_en: HHS Successfully Concludes Hantavirus Response Effort; Monitoring Ends with No Positive U.S. Case HHS.gov
updates.summary_zh: 美国 HHS 成功结束汉坦病毒响应，监测结束，无阳性病例。

updates.title_en: International public health response helped contain Andes hantavirus outbreak on Dutch cruise ship - CIDRAP
updates.body_en: International public health response helped contain Andes hantavirus outbreak on Dutch cruise ship CIDRAP
updates.summary_zh: 国际公共卫生应对措施帮助控制荷兰邮轮上的安第斯汉坦病毒疫情。
